no: Shar-Teel for Siege of Dragonspear by elminster/panshaigan. Adds Shar-Teel as a joinable NPC during SoD with dialogue, personality, and romance compatibility.
sum: Adds Shar-Teel as a joinable NPC companion during the Siege of Dragonspear campaign.

co.no: Adds Shar-Teel as a fully playable NPC companion during SoD with banters and character development.
v18 moved to cn:0 (was cn:99971 in older version). Adds Shar-Teel as a fully playable NPC companion during SoD with banters and character development.

advisories.reason: BG1NPCSoA cn:2 adds Shar-Teel to BG2 as Nightbringer of Shar. This mod adds her to SoD. Both can coexist (different campaigns) but may have continuity inconsistencies.
